name_en: Saint Laurent Envelope Bag is freshly out!! Simply beautiful to the heart. High-end goods, original hardware logo, first choice imported leather, texture is super amazing 😍😍 It is said everyone needs one, this style must be kept. Classic shape! It really catches the eye. Beauty, hurry up and grab it. The real thing is just too beautiful 💕 Size 23 15, Item No. 377828
